Command Channels.name: allow
Command Channels.description: Restricts a category or command to only the specified channels.

params.name: channels
params.desc: One or more channel mentions.

params.name: target
params.desc: A command name (e.g. `.ping`) or category name.

Command Channels.note: Admin only. Overrides any existing rule for the target.

Command Channels.name: clear
Command Channels.description: Removes the channel rule for a category or command so it works everywhere again.

params.name: target
params.desc: The command or category to clear the rule for.

Command Channels.note: Admin only. The command/category will work in all channels after clearing.

Command Channels.name: cmd
Command Channels.description: Manages command channel rules — restrict or allow commands in specific channels.
Command Channels.note: Admin only. Subcommands: allow, deny, clear, show.

Command Channels.name: deny
Command Channels.description: Blocks a category or command in the specified channels.

params.name: channels
params.desc: One or more channel mentions.

params.name: target
params.desc: A command name (e.g. `.play`) or category name.

Command Channels.name: show
Command Channels.description: Shows active channel rules for this server, or for a specific target.

params.name: target
params.desc: Optional command or category to check.

Command Channels.note: Admin only. Run without arguments to see all rules.

Moderation.name: bots
Moderation.description: Bulk-deletes bot messages and prefix (`.`) messages in this channel.

params.name: limit
params.desc: Number of messages to scan (max 200, default 50).

Moderation.note: Requires manage_messages permission. Only deletes bot messages and messages starting with `.`.

Moderation.name: purge
Moderation.description: Root command — shows subcommands. .purge bots bulk-deletes bot and prefix messages.

Server Management.name: alias
Server Management.description: Lists, adds, or removes custom command aliases.

params.name: new
params.desc: The new alias name.

params.name: existing
params.desc: The existing command to alias.

params.name: action
params.desc: Use `remove` to delete an alias.

Server Management.note: Anyone can view the alias list. Adding/removing requires admin. Built-in aliases are shown automatically.

Server Management.name: confess
Server Management.description: Sets the confession channel for the server.

params.name: action
params.desc: Currently only `set` is supported.

params.name: channel
params.desc: The channel to send confessions to.

Server Management.name: ignore
Server Management.description: Toggles ignoring a user — the bot won't respond to them in AI channels.

params.name: user
params.desc: The member to ignore or unignore.

Server Management.name: ignorelist
Server Management.description: Shows all users currently ignored by the bot in AI channels.

Server Management.name: setcolor
Server Management.description: Changes the embed accent colour for this server.

params.name: color
params.desc: Hex colour code with or without #.

Server Management.note: Only the bot owner/creator can change the colour.

Server Management.name: whitelist
Server Management.description: Toggles a user on or off the staff whitelist.

params.name: user
params.desc: The member to toggle. Omit to see usage.

Server Management.note: Only the bot owner/creator can manage the whitelist.

Server Management.name: whitelistshow
Server Management.description: Shows all users currently on the staff whitelist.
Server Management.note: Only the bot owner/creator can view this.

AI.name: aiadd
AI.description: Enables AI chat responses in a channel.

params.name: channel
params.desc: The channel to enable AI in. Defaults to current channel.

AI.name: ailist
AI.description: Shows all AI-enabled channels and DM whitelisted users.

AI.name: airemove
AI.description: Disables AI chat responses in a channel.

params.name: channel
params.desc: The channel to disable AI in. Defaults to current channel.

AI.name: aitoggle
AI.description: Switches the active AI provider between NVIDIA and Zen.

params.name: provider
params.desc: `nvidia` or `zen` — the AI backend to use.

AI.name: crefresh
AI.description: Wipes conversation memory and re-reads the last 60 messages.

params.name: target
params.desc: Set to `all` to refresh conversations for all users.

AI.name: creset
AI.description: Resets conversation memory for a user or everyone.

params.name: target
params.desc: A user mention or `all` to reset everyone.

AI.note: Owner only. Clears the AI's memory of past conversations.

AI.name: crestore
AI.description: Restores conversation memory from the last backup.
AI.note: Owner only. Restores from the auto-backup file.

AI.name: dmadd
AI.description: Enables DM AI responses for a user.

params.name: user
params.desc: The user to enable DM AI for.

AI.name: dmrefresh
AI.description: Refreshes your DM conversation from scratch.
AI.note: Owner only. Wipes and re-reads recent messages.

AI.name: dmremove
AI.description: Disables DM AI responses for a user.

params.name: user
params.desc: The user to disable DM AI for.

AI.name: dmreset
AI.note: Owner only. Clears the conversation history.

AI.name: model
AI.description: Lists, adds, or removes AI models used for response racing.

params.name: action
params.desc: `add` or `remove`.

params.name: value
params.desc: Model name (for add) or index number (for remove).

AI.note: Owner only. Multiple models race to respond; the fastest reply wins.

AI.name: mreset
AI.description: Clears the bot's memory notes for a user.

params.name: user
params.desc: The user to clear memory for. Omit for self.

AI.note: Owner only. Memory notes are stored separately from conversation history.

AI.name: mrestore
AI.description: Restores bot memory from the last backup.
AI.note: Owner only. Restores memory notes from the auto-backup.

AI.name: nvidia
AI.description: Browse all models from build.nvidia.com and add them to the race list.
AI.note: Owner only. Paginated list with a dropdown to pick models.

Fun.name: imagine

params.name: prompt
params.desc: Description of the image to generate.

Fun.note: Uses NVIDIA FLUX.2 model. Per-user cooldown applies.

Moderation.name: uwulock
Moderation.description: Toggles uwulock on a user — all their messages become uwufied.

params.name: member
params.desc: The member to uwulock.

params.name: channel
params.desc: Specific channel to restrict it to (optional — omit for all channels).

Moderation.note: Staff only. Uses webhooks to rewrite messages. If no channel is given, toggles all-channel lock.

Leaderboards.name: leaderboard
Leaderboards.description: Leaderboards for messages and VC time.

Leaderboards.name: messages
Leaderboards.description: Shows the top 200 message senders in the server.
Leaderboards.note: Updates in real-time as messages are sent.

Leaderboards.name: vctime
Leaderboards.description: Shows the top 200 VC time leaders in the server.
Leaderboards.note: Tracks time spent in voice channels.

Reminders.name: bday
Reminders.description: Saves a birthday — the bot DMs you every year on the date. Date format: `MM/DD` or `YYYY/MM/DD`.

params.name: date
params.desc: Birthday date: `MM/DD` or `YYYY/MM/DD`.

params.name: target
params.desc: Optional @user or name. Defaults to yourself.

Reminders.note: The bot will DM you a birthday greeting every year on the saved date.

Reminders.name: cancel
Reminders.description: Cancels a reminder by its ID.

params.name: id
params.desc: The reminder ID (shown in `.remind list`).

Reminders.note: You can only cancel your own reminders.

Reminders.name: list
Reminders.note: Shows reminder IDs, time remaining, and preview of the message.

Reminders.name: list
Reminders.note: Shows the saved dates and names.

Reminders.name: remind
Reminders.description: DM-yourself reminder. `<when>` accepts relative (`5s`, `5m`, `2h`, `2d`, `1w`) or absolute (`YYYY/MM/DD [HH:MM]`) time.

params.name: when
params.desc: Time spec: relative (`5m`, `2h`, `1d`) or absolute (`2026/12/25 14:30`).

params.name: text
params.desc: Reminder message (max 500 chars).

Reminders.note: You will receive a DM when the reminder triggers. Time is UTC.

params.name: target
params.desc: The user or name whose birthday to remove. Defaults to yourself.

Server Stats.name: emoji
Server Stats.description: Changes the reaction emoji the starboard watches for.

params.name: emoji
params.desc: The emoji to track for starboard entries.

Server Stats.note: Admin only. A starboard channel must be set first.

Server Stats.name: seoulities
Server Stats.description: Shows a server info card with member stats, top emoji, top reactor, top chatter, and top VC user.
Server Stats.note: Cooldown: 15s per channel. Generates an info card image.

Server Stats.name: starboard
Server Stats.description: Manages the starboard: set channel, emoji, and reaction threshold.

params.name: channel
params.desc: The channel to use as starboard.

params.name: emoji
params.desc: Reaction emoji to track.

params.name: threshold
params.desc: Number of reactions required to appear on starboard.

Server Stats.name: threshold
Server Stats.description: Sets the minimum reactions needed for a message to appear on the starboard.

params.name: threshold
params.desc: Minimum reaction count (must be at least 1).

Server Stats.note: Admin only. A starboard channel must be set first.

Help.name: help
Help.description: Shows the full command catalogue or detailed info for a specific command.

params.name: command
params.desc: Optional command name to get detailed info about.

Help.note: Without arguments, shows a link to the web help site. Use `.help <command>` for detailed info.

Image.name: bar
Image.description: Adds a coloured bar or border to every attached image.

params.name: type
params.desc: Bar position: `top`, `bottom`, `left`, `right`. Defaults to all sides (border).

params.name: color
params.desc: Colour (hex or name). Defaults to black.

params.name: size
params.desc: Bar thickness in pixels.

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base output filename.

Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple outputs.

Image.name: bouncegif
Image.description: Creates a bouncing animation with easing for every attached image.

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base output filename.

Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple GIFs (suffixed _2, _3, ...).

Image.name: downscale
Image.description: Shrinks every attached image by a given factor.

params.name: factor
params.desc: Downscale divisor (default 2).

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base output filename.

Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple outputs.

Image.name: fadegif
Image.description: Creates a fade-in animation from a solid colour to every attached image.

params.name: color
params.desc: Starting colour (hex or name). Defaults to black.

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base output filename.

Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple GIFs (suffixed _2, _3, ...).

Image.name: gif
Image.description: Converts every attached image to a GIF. Attach or reply with images.

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base filename; appended with _2, _3, ... for more.

Image.note: Works on images attached to this message OR replies. If multiple images are present, every image is converted and sent back.

Image.name: lowquality
Image.description: Drastically reduces image quality on every attached image for a cursed pixelated look.

params.name: factor
params.desc: Quality reduction factor (default 10). Higher = worse quality.

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base output filename.

Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple outputs.

Image.name: spingif
Image.description: Creates a spinning animation from every attached image (45-degree steps).

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base output filename.

Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple GIFs (suffixed _2, _3, ...).

Image.name: textgif
Image.description: Creates a typing animation GIF (max 30 characters).

params.name: text
params.desc: Text to animate (max 30 chars).

Image.note: Generates an animated GIF that simulates typing the text character by character.

Image.name: thisu
Image.description: Applies a POV overlay effect to every attached image or GIF.
Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple outputs (suffixed _2, _3, ...). Uses a first-person POV border effect.

Image.name: upscale
Image.description: Upscales every attached image by a given factor (1x to 6x).

params.name: factor
params.desc: Upscale factor (1-6, default 2).

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base output filename.

Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple outputs (suffixed _2, _3, ...).

Image.name: zoomgif
Image.description: Creates a smooth zoom-in or zoom-out animation for every attached image.

params.name: direction
params.desc: `in` or `out`. Defaults to `in`.

params.name: fade
params.desc: Include `fade` to enable fade effect.

params.name: color
params.desc: Background colour (hex or name).

params.name: name
params.desc: Optional base output filename.

Image.note: Attach or reply with images. Multiple images produce multiple GIFs (suffixed _2, _3, ...).

Leveling.name: disable
Leveling.description: Disables level-up notifications for this server.
Leveling.note: Users will still gain XP and roles, but no level-up messages are sent.

Leveling.name: enable
Leveling.description: Enables level-up notifications for this server.
Leveling.note: Users will receive a DM when they level up.

Leveling.name: givexp
Leveling.description: Manually gives XP to a user (admin only).

params.name: amount
params.desc: Amount of XP to give.

params.name: user
params.desc: The target member. Defaults to yourself.

Leveling.name: levelleaderboard
Leveling.note: Displays the top XP earners in the server.

Leveling.name: levelnotify
Leveling.description: Toggles or checks level-up notification status for this server.

params.name: action
params.desc: `enable` or `disable`. Omit to check current status.

Leveling.note: Users still gain XP and roles even when notifications are disabled.

Leveling.name: levelrole
Leveling.description: Assigns a role to be awarded at a specific level.

params.name: level
params.desc: The level at which to award the role.

params.name: role
params.desc: The role to assign.

Leveling.note: Admin only. The role is automatically assigned when a member reaches the specified level.

Leveling.name: rank
Leveling.description: Checks your or another user's XP rank and level.

params.name: user
params.desc: The member to check. Defaults to yourself.

Leveling.note: Shows current level, XP progress, and server rank.

params.name: level
params.desc: The level to remove the role reward from.

misc.label: Echo
misc.desc: Staff utility to echo messages through the bot.

Echo.name: dm
Echo.description: Sends a DM to a user as the bot.

params.name: user
params.desc: The user to DM.

params.name: message
params.desc: The message content to send.

Echo.name: dmcheck
Echo.description: Exports DM history with a user as a .txt file.

params.name: user
params.desc: The user whose DM history to export.

Echo.note: Staff only. Fetches up to 100 most recent messages.

Echo.name: echo
Echo.description: Opens a modal to send a message as the bot.
Echo.note: Admin only. Opens an interactive modal for message input.

Echo.name: link
Echo.description: Sends the Seoulities website link with an info embed.
Echo.note: The image is loaded from local assets.

Echo.name: ping
Echo.description: Shows the bot's current WebSocket and round-trip latency.
Echo.note: Displays both heartbeat latency and message edit RTT. The ping target is purely flavour text.

Echo.name: random
Echo.description: Picks a random non-bot member in the server and mentions them.
Echo.note: Has a GIF cooldown per user.

Echo.name: status
Echo.description: Shows uptime, latency, memory usage, and Lavalink status.
Echo.note: Memory is read from /proc/self/status (Linux only). Lavalink RAM uses the /v4/stats endpoint.

music.label: Music
music.desc: Music playback, queue controls, and audio filters.

Controls.name: dedupe
Controls.description: Removes duplicate tracks from the queue.
Controls.note: Keeps only the first occurrence of each track.

Controls.name: empty
Controls.note: The current track will continue playing.

Controls.name: exportqueue
Controls.description: DMs you the current queue as clickable links.
Controls.note: Each track is sent as a clickable link to the song on its source platform.

Controls.name: fastforward
Controls.description: Fast-forwards by a number of seconds (default 10s).

params.name: seconds
params.desc: Seconds to skip forward (default 10).

Controls.name: move
Controls.description: Moves a track from one position to another in the queue.

params.name: from
params.desc: Current position of the track.

params.name: to
params.desc: New position for the track.

Controls.name: queue
Controls.description: Shows the current queue with total duration and loop mode. Paginated.
Controls.note: Use `.queue remove`, `.queue shuffle`, `.queue empty`, `.queue move`, `.queue skipto`, or `.queue dedupe` for more queue management.

Controls.name: remove
Controls.description: Removes a track from the queue by its position number.

params.name: position
params.desc: Position of the track in the queue to remove.

Controls.name: replay
Controls.description: Restarts the current track from the beginning.
Controls.note: Works like a seek to position 0.

Controls.name: rewind
Controls.description: Rewinds by a number of seconds (default 10s).

params.name: seconds
params.desc: Seconds to go back (default 10).

Controls.name: seek
Controls.description: Jumps to a specific position in the current track.

params.name: time
params.desc: Target position: `1:30` (mm:ss) or `90` (seconds).

Controls.note: Not supported on all tracks (e.g. live streams).

Controls.name: shuffle
Controls.note: Same as `.shuffle` but as a queue subcommand.

Controls.name: skipto
Controls.description: Skips directly to a specific position in the queue.

params.name: pos
params.desc: Queue position to skip to.

Controls.note: All tracks before the target position are removed.

Filters.name: bassboost
Filters.description: Applies a heavy bass boost filter — punchy low-end.

Filters.name: clearfilter
Filters.description: Clears all active audio filters and restores clean audio.
Filters.note: Turns off all filter effects at once.

Filters.name: concert
Filters.description: Applies a live concert hall reverb effect.

Filters.name: dolby
Filters.description: Applies a Dolby surround sound effect.

Filters.name: eightd
Filters.description: Applies 8D audio — sound rotates around your head.
Filters.note: Toggle effect. Best experienced with headphones. Use `.clearfilter` to remove.

Filters.name: heaven
Filters.description: Applies an ethereal, airy filter — floaty and soft.

Filters.name: instrumental
Filters.description: Attempts to remove vocals — karaoke mode.
Filters.note: Toggle effect. Works best on tracks with centered vocals. Use `.clearfilter` to remove.

Filters.name: lofi
Filters.description: Applies a low-fidelity filter — mellow and warm sound.

Filters.name: nightcore
Filters.description: Applies a higher pitch and speed filter — anime/nightcore style.

Filters.name: preset
Filters.description: Opens a dropdown to browse and apply audio filters.
Filters.note: Select from available filter presets. Use `.clearfilter` to reset.

Filters.name: reverseroom
Filters.description: Applies a reverse room — flipped spatial effect.

Filters.name: rotation
Filters.description: Applies a hall/spacious cave-like ambience effect.
Filters.note: Toggle effect. For 8D rotation specifically, use `.eightd`. Use `.clearfilter` to remove.

Filters.name: slowed
Filters.description: Applies a slowed + reverb effect — chill and dreamy.

Filters.name: tremolocmd
Filters.description: Applies a tremolo effect — rapid volume oscillation.

Filters.name: vibrato
Filters.description: Applies a vibrato effect — rapid pitch oscillation.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the playlist to delete.

Music.name: info
Music.description: Shows detailed information about a saved playlist.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the playlist to inspect.

Music.note: Shows track list, total duration, and creation date.

Music.name: list
Music.note: Shows playlist names and track counts.

Music.name: load
Music.description: Loads a saved playlist into the queue.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the playlist to load.

Music.note: Appends the playlist tracks to the current queue.

Music.name: playlist
Music.description: Plays a saved playlist by name.

params.name: name
params.desc: The name of the playlist to play.

Music.note: Playlists are per-user. See `.playlist list` for your saved playlists.

Music.name: save
Music.description: Saves the current music queue as a named playlist.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name for the new playlist.

Music.note: Saves the current queue. Max playlists per user is capped.

Playback.name: autoplay
Playback.description: Toggles autoplay — plays similar tracks after the queue ends.
Playback.note: When enabled, the bot will automatically add similar tracks when the queue is empty.

Playback.name: dailyhits
Playback.description: Opens a genre dropdown to load daily hit tracks.
Playback.note: Pick a genre from the dropdown to see today's top tracks in that genre.

Playback.name: disconnect
Playback.description: Stops playback, clears the queue, and leaves the voice channel.
Playback.note: Use this instead of just leaving the VC — it ensures proper cleanup.

Playback.name: history
Playback.description: Shows the last 10 tracks that were played in this session.
Playback.note: Session history resets when the bot leaves the voice channel.

Playback.name: loop
Playback.description: Opens a dropdown to set the loop mode (track / queue / off).
Playback.note: Select from the dropdown: Track (repeat one), Queue (repeat all), or Off.

Playback.name: lyrics
Playback.description: Fetches lyrics for the current track or a search query. Results are paginated.

params.name: query
params.desc: Song name to search lyrics for. Omit to use current track.

Playback.note: Uses syncedlyrics and LRCLIB. Supports synced/karaoke-style lyrics.

Playback.name: nowplaying
Playback.description: Shows the currently playing track with a generated music card.
Playback.note: Displays an interactive embed with album art, progress bar, and controls.

Playback.name: pause
Playback.description: Pauses the current playback.
Playback.note: Use `.resume` to continue playing.

Playback.name: play
Playback.description: Plays a song or playlist. Auto-detects YouTube, Spotify, and SoundCloud links.

params.name: query
params.desc: Song name or URL. Supports YouTube, Spotify, and SoundCloud links.

Playback.note: Join a voice channel first. You can queue multiple songs. Spotify playlists are auto-scraped.

Playback.name: playnext
Playback.description: Adds a track to the front of the queue so it plays next.

params.name: query
params.desc: Song name or URL. Same sources as `.play`.

Playback.note: The track is inserted at position 1 in the queue (after the current track).

Playback.name: radio
Playback.description: Plays an internet radio station by name.

params.name: name
params.desc: Radio station name or search term.

Playback.note: Joins voice and starts streaming the radio station.

Playback.name: resume
Playback.description: Resumes paused playback.
Playback.note: Only works if playback is currently paused.

Playback.name: save
Playback.description: DMs you the current track info so you don't lose it.
Playback.note: Sends a DM with the track name, artist, and URL.

Playback.name: shuffle
Playback.description: Shuffles the current queue into a random order.
Playback.note: The current track continues playing; only upcoming tracks are shuffled.

Playback.name: similar
Playback.description: Shows similar tracks to the current one. Pick up to 7 to add to the queue.
Playback.note: Uses the current track to recommend similar songs via a selection menu.

Playback.name: skip
Playback.description: Skips the current track. Requires a vote if multiple people are in voice.
Playback.note: If you're alone, the track skips immediately. In a group, a vote is started.

Playback.name: stats
Playback.description: Shows session stats: tracks played, total time, and top requester.
Playback.note: Stats reset when the bot leaves the voice channel.

Playback.name: sync
Playback.description: Forces synced karaoke-style lyrics for the current track.
Playback.note: Only works if synced lyrics are available for the current track.

Playback.name: volume
Playback.description: Checks or sets the playback volume (1-200%).

params.name: level
params.desc: Volume level (1-200). Omit to check current volume.

Playback.note: Default is 100%. Values above 100 may cause distortion.

Playback.name: voteskip
Playback.description: Starts a vote to skip the current track.
Playback.note: Works in tandem with `.skip`. Majority vote is required in group sessions.

Guild Avatars.name: viewavatar
Guild Avatars.description: Views a user's custom server avatar in full size.

params.name: user
params.desc: The member to view. Defaults to yourself.

Guild Avatars.note: Shows the full-resolution custom server avatar.

Profile.name: activity
Profile.description: Sets or clears the bot's activity status.

params.name: type
params.desc: Activity type: playing, listening, watching, competing, or none (to clear).

params.name: text
params.desc: The activity text to display.

Profile.note: Owner only. Use `.activity none` to clear the current activity.

Profile.name: banner

params.name: source
params.desc: Image URL, attachment, or `reset` to clear.

Profile.note: Owner only. Same rate-limit as avatar: ~2 per 10 minutes.

Profile.name: pfp

params.name: source
params.desc: Image URL, attachment, or `reset` to clear.

Profile.note: Owner only. Discord rate-limits avatar changes to ~2 per 10 minutes.

Profile.name: presence

params.name: status
params.desc: One of: online, idle, dnd, invisible.

Profile.note: Owner only. Your current presence preference is saved and restored on restart.

Profile.name: profile
Profile.description: Views your or another user's profile with server avatar.

params.name: user
params.desc: The member to view. Defaults to yourself.

Profile.note: Shows the server-specific profile including custom avatar.

Profile.name: removeavatar
Profile.note: Your global Discord avatar will be shown again.

Profile.name: rpc
Profile.description: Auto-managed status rotation. 1 entry = static, 2+ = cycles. Max 5 entries, min 5s interval.

params.name: action
params.desc: add, remove, clear, interval, or omit to show current rotation.

params.name: emoji
params.desc: Optional emoji (for add action).

params.name: text
params.desc: Status text (for add action).

params.name: n
params.desc: Index number (for remove action).

params.name: seconds
params.desc: Interval in seconds (for interval action, min 5).

Profile.note: Owner only. Statuses cycle in order. Max 5 entries, minimum 5s interval.

Profile.name: serveravatars
Profile.description: Shows all custom avatars set in this server.
Profile.note: Displays a paginated list of all users with custom server avatars.

Profile.name: setavatar
Profile.description: Sets a custom avatar for this server only.

params.name: image_url
params.desc: Direct URL to the image to use as avatar.

Profile.note: The avatar only shows in this server. Other servers will still see your global Discord avatar.

Profile.name: username

params.name: name
params.desc: New username (2-32 characters).

Profile.note: Owner only. Discord rate-limits username changes to ~2 per 2 hours.

RPC.name: add
RPC.description: Adds a custom-status entry for rotation.

params.name: emoji
params.desc: Optional emoji prefix.

params.name: text
params.desc: Status text.

RPC.name: clear
RPC.description: Removes all RPC entries and stops rotation.
RPC.note: Owner only. This cannot be undone.

RPC.name: interval
RPC.description: Sets or checks the interval for status rotation cycling.

params.name: seconds
params.desc: Interval in seconds (min 5). Omit to check current interval.

RPC.name: remove
RPC.description: Removes a custom-status entry by its index number.

params.name: index
params.desc: Index number of the entry to remove.

RPC.note: Owner only. Use `.rpc` without arguments to see the list with indices.

Reactions.name: rc
Reactions.description: Shows reaction count for a user, optionally filtered by emoji.

params.name: user
params.desc: The member to check. Defaults to yourself.

params.name: emoji
params.desc: Optional emoji filter.

Reactions.note: Shows total reaction count, server rank, and per-emoji breakdown.

Reactions.name: rctop
Reactions.description: Shows the leaderboard filtered to one specific emoji.

params.name: emoji
params.desc: The emoji to filter by (actual emoji, emoji name, or `:name:` format).

Reactions.name: rsr
Reactions.description: Resets ALL reaction data for this server.
Reactions.note: Owner only. Requires confirmation via `yes` before executing.

Reactions.name: rtop
Reactions.description: Shows the reaction leaderboard for the whole server.
Reactions.note: Displays the top users ranked by total reactions received.

Reactions.name: rur
Reactions.description: Resets all reaction data for a specific user.

params.name: user
params.desc: The member whose reaction data to wipe.

Reactions.note: Owner only. This cannot be undone.

Staff.name: cid
Staff.description: Reveals who sent a confession (DM only).

params.name: target
params.desc: `latest`, a confession number, or `user`.

params.name: user_id
params.desc: User ID to look up (only used with `user` mode).

Staff.note: Staff only. Must be run in DMs. Uses cached config.

theme.label: Theme
theme.desc: Server theme management — roles, channel prefixes, unicode fonts.

Channels.name: add
Channels.description: Adds or replaces a prefix emoji on all channels in one or more categories.

params.name: emoji
params.desc: The emoji or symbol to use as prefix.

params.name: categories
params.desc: One or more category channels to apply the prefix to.

Channels.note: Existing prefixes on channels will be replaced.

Channels.name: add
Channels.description: Adds a category to a group and applies the group's prefix to all its channels.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the target group.

params.name: category
params.desc: The category to add to the group.

Channels.note: All channels in the category will be prefixed with the group's prefix.

Channels.name: apply
Channels.description: Stamps a group's prefix onto one specific channel without adding it to the group.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the group whose prefix to use.

params.name: channel
params.desc: The channel to stamp the prefix on.

Channels.note: The channel's name is prefixed but it is NOT added to the group's category list.

Channels.name: channel
Channels.description: Manages channel names. Subcommand: `strip`.
Channels.note: Root command for channel name subcommands.

Channels.name: create
Channels.description: Manually creates a named prefix group.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name for the new prefix group.

params.name: prefix
params.desc: The prefix emoji or symbol for channels in this group.

Channels.note: The prefix is not applied to any channels yet. Use `.theme group add` to assign categories.

Channels.name: delete
Channels.description: Deletes a prefix group record. Does not rename any channels.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the group to delete.

Channels.note: Channel names are NOT changed when a group is deleted.

Channels.name: font
Channels.description: Manages channel fonts — list, set, reset.
Channels.note: Root command for font subcommands: list, set, reset.

Channels.name: group
Channels.description: Manages named prefix groups — run `.theme group setup` to get started.
Channels.note: Root command. Subcommands: setup, list, create, delete, set, add, remove, apply. `.tg` is a shorthand alias.

Channels.name: list
Channels.description: Shows all stored channel prefixes for this server.
Channels.note: Displays each channel and its current prefix.

Channels.name: list
Channels.description: Shows all available unicode font styles with live examples.
Channels.note: Each font style is displayed with a sample of how it transforms text.

Channels.name: list
Channels.description: Shows all prefix groups — name, prefix, categories, and channel count.
Channels.note: Displays a summary of all configured prefix groups.

Channels.name: prefix
Channels.description: Manages channel prefixes — run `.theme prefix scan` to get started.
Channels.note: Root command for all prefix subcommands: scan, add, remove, server, replace, undo, list.

Channels.name: remove
Channels.description: Strips prefixes from channels in specific categories, or from every channel.

params.name: category
params.desc: Category to strip prefixes from. Omit to strip all.

Channels.note: Only removes leading emojis/symbols that were detected as prefixes.

Channels.name: remove
Channels.description: Removes a category from a group. Channel names are not changed.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the group.

params.name: category
params.desc: The category to remove from the group.

Channels.note: Channel names retain their current prefix. Use `.theme prefix remove` to strip prefixes.

Channels.name: replace
Channels.description: Replaces a detected prefix with a new one across the server.

params.name: n
params.desc: The index of the prefix to replace (from scan results).

params.name: new
params.desc: The new prefix emoji or symbol.

Channels.note: Use `.theme prefix scan` first to see detected prefixes and their indices.

Channels.name: reset
Channels.description: Strips unicode font styling from channel names.

params.name: target
params.desc: `all` for server-wide, or a category mention.

Channels.note: Restores the original (pre-font) channel names.

Channels.name: scan
Channels.description: Detects existing emoji/symbol prefixes in a category or server-wide.

params.name: category
params.desc: Category to scan. Omit to scan all channels.

Channels.note: The scan detects leading emojis/symbols in channel names and reports them.

Channels.name: server
Channels.description: Applies a prefix to every channel in the server, or removes all prefixes server-wide.

params.name: emoji
params.desc: Emoji to apply server-wide. Omit to remove all prefixes.

Channels.note: This overrides any existing prefixes on all channels.

Channels.name: set
Channels.description: Applies a unicode font to channel names.

params.name: font
params.desc: Font style name (from `.theme font list`).

params.name: target
params.desc: `all` for server-wide, or one or more category mentions.

Channels.note: Only visible to Discord clients that support unicode font rendering.

Channels.name: set
Channels.description: Changes a group's prefix and renames all channels in that group.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the group to update.

params.name: new prefix
params.desc: The new prefix emoji or symbol.

Channels.note: All channels in the group are immediately renamed with the new prefix.

Channels.name: setup
Channels.description: Scans the entire server for prefixes and interactively creates named prefix groups.
Channels.note: Interactive wizard. Detects existing prefixes and lets you assign them to named groups.

Channels.name: strip
Channels.description: Strips an exact piece of text from every channel name in the server.

params.name: text
params.desc: The exact text to remove from all channel names.

Channels.note: Case-sensitive. Only exact matches are removed.

Channels.name: tg
Channels.description: Shorthand alias for `.theme group` — accepts all the same subcommands.
Channels.note: Same as `.theme group` but shorter to type.

Channels.name: undo
Channels.description: Undoes the last prefix operation (add, remove, or all).
Channels.note: Only the most recent prefix change can be undone.

Overview.name: theme
Overview.description: Shows the current theme summary — roles, prefixes, font, and snapshot status.
Overview.note: This is the entry point. Use `.theme help` to see all subcommands.

Presets.name: apply
Presets.description: Previews then applies a saved preset to this server.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the preset to apply.

Presets.note: A snapshot is created before applying so you can revert with `.theme reset`.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name of the preset to delete.

Presets.name: presets
Presets.description: Lists all saved presets for this server.
Presets.note: Shows preset names and creation dates.

Presets.name: reset
Presets.description: Undoes the last `.theme apply` — restores roles and channels from the snapshot.
Presets.note: Only one snapshot is stored. A new `.theme apply` overwrites it.

Presets.name: save
Presets.description: Saves the current server role and channel state as a named preset.

params.name: name
params.desc: Name for the preset.

Presets.note: Presets include role mappings, channel names, prefixes, and fonts.

Presets.name: snapshot
Presets.description: Shows what's currently saved in the undo snapshot.
Presets.note: Displays the pre-apply state that would be restored by `.theme reset`.

Presets.name: undo
Presets.description: Alias for `.theme reset` — pops a single snapshot to undo the last change.

Roles.name: revert
Roles.description: Reverts one role back to its name from before the last theme apply.

params.name: slot
params.desc: The slot to restore the previous name for.

Roles.note: Only the most recent name change per role is stored.

Roles.name: role
Roles.description: Renames the Discord role mapped to a slot. E.g. `.theme role Owner God Emperor`

params.name: slot
params.desc: The slot whose role to rename.

params.name: new name
params.desc: The new display name for the role.

Roles.note: This actually changes the role name on Discord. Use `.theme role revert` to undo.

Roles.name: roleicon
Roles.description: Sets a role icon via emoji, URL, or image attachment. Requires boost level 2.

params.name: slot
params.desc: The slot to set the icon for.

params.name: source
params.desc: Emoji, image URL, or attachment. Omit to clear.

Roles.note: Requires server boost level 2 for role icons.

Setup.name: clear
Setup.description: Wipes all slot mappings. Role names in Discord are not changed. Run `.theme roles setup` after to remap.
Setup.note: This only clears the internal mapping, not the actual role names. Run setup again to remap.

Setup.name: help
Setup.description: Shows all theme commands organised by section.
Setup.note: Displays a complete list of theme subcommands grouped by category.

Setup.name: roles
Setup.description: Lists all mapped role slots and their current Discord roles.

Setup.name: setbanner
Setup.description: Sets and stores the server banner in the current theme.

params.name: source
params.desc: Image URL or attachment. Omit to clear the stored banner.

Setup.note: The banner is saved as part of the theme and can be restored with `.theme apply`.

Setup.name: seticon
Setup.description: Sets and stores the server icon in the current theme.

params.name: source
params.desc: Image URL or attachment. Omit to clear the stored icon.

Setup.note: The icon is saved as part of the theme and can be restored with `.theme apply`.

Setup.name: setrole
Setup.description: Quickly remaps one slot to a different role without going through the full wizard.

params.name: slot
params.desc: The slot name (e.g. Owner, Admin, Member).

params.name: role
params.desc: The discord role to map to this slot.

Setup.note: Only maps the slot. Use `.theme role` to rename the role itself.

Setup.name: setup
Setup.description: Interactive wizard — define custom role slots and map them to server roles via dropdowns.
Setup.note: This is the recommended starting point for new servers. Guides you through the entire configuration.

Setup.name: setup
Setup.description: Runs the role mapping wizard. Shows current mapping per slot so you can skip or remap individual ones.
Setup.note: Interactive — you will be prompted for each slot.

Utility.name: anilist
Utility.description: Checks AniList API status and latency.
Utility.note: No authentication required. Uses the AniList GraphQL API.

Vanity.name: channel
Vanity.description: Sets the notification channel for vanity matches.

params.name: channel
params.desc: The channel to send vanity match notifications to.

Vanity.name: config
Vanity.description: Shows the current vanity configuration for this server.

Vanity.name: message
Vanity.description: Sets the notification message for vanity matches. Use `{{user}}`, `{{username}}`, `{{server}}` as placeholders.

params.name: text
params.desc: The message template. Supports `{{user}}`, `{{username}}`, and `{{server}}` placeholders.

Vanity.name: reset
Vanity.description: Resets all vanity configuration for this server.
Vanity.note: Staff only. This cannot be undone.

Vanity.name: role
Vanity.description: Sets the role to assign when a status match is found.

params.name: role
params.desc: The role to assign on status match.

Vanity.name: substring
Vanity.description: Sets the status substring the bot watches for.

params.name: text
params.desc: The substring to match in member statuses.

Vanity.note: Staff only. Members whose status contains this text will trigger the configured notification.

Vanity.name: vanity
Vanity.description: Vanity status tracker — root command for all vanity subcommands.
Vanity.note: Staff only. Subcommands: config, substring, channel, message, role, reset.
